title.en: China-to-Malawi Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入马拉维：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入馬拉威：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Malawi MBS conformity (PVoC-style import) requirements, MERA licensing, ESCOM grid-connection conditions, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, donor and lender procurement specifications, and off-grid / mini-grid quality standards (IEC TS 62257, VeraSol) — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与马拉维MBS合格评定（PVoC式进口）要求、MERA许可证、ESCOM并网条件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数、捐助方及贷款方采购规格，以及离网/微电网质量标准（IEC TS 62257、VeraSol）——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與馬拉威MBS合格評定（PVoC式進口）要求、MERA許可證、ESCOM併網條件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數、捐助方及貸款方採購規格，以及離網/微電網質量標準（IEC TS 62257、VeraSol）——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MBS conformity scope determination, MERA licensing decision, ESCOM grid-connection approval, donor or lender procurement eligibility determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Malawi MBS import conformity requirements, MERA licensing conditions, ESCOM grid-connection technical specifications, and project-owner or donor-lender requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MBS合格评定范围裁定、MERA许可裁定、ESCOM并网批准、捐助方或贷款方采购资格裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行马拉维MBS进口合格要求、MERA许可证条件、ESCOM并网技术规格及项目业主或捐助方/贷款方要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MBS合格評定範圍裁定、MERA許可裁定、ESCOM併網批准、捐助方或貸款方採購資格裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬拉威MBS進口合格要求、MERA許可證條件、ESCOM併網技術規格及項目業主或捐助方/貸款方要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Malawi, the key practical gaps are: (1) MBS import conformity assessment (a PVoC-style pre-shipment or destination inspection scheme) — Chinese GB/T certificates are not automatically accepted; (2) MERA licensing for the project or supply activity, which may specify IEC-based equipment standards; (3) ESCOM grid-connection conditions for grid-tied inverters, which reference IEC standards (IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116) and Malawi's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V parameters common in China; (4) donor and lender procurement rules (World Bank, MCC, AfDB) for utility-scale or donor-funded projects, which typically require third-party IEC type-test certificates from ILAC-accredited laboratories; and (5) for off-grid and mini-grid solar home systems, VeraSol / IEC TS 62257 quality verification as increasingly required by development-finance buyers. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines do not satisfy Malawi's IEC-referenced requirements and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口马拉维时，主要实际差距包括：（1）MBS进口合格评定（PVoC式装运前或目的地检验方案）——中国GB/T证书不被自动接受；（2）项目或供货活动的MERA许可证，可能规定基于IEC的设备标准；（3）并网逆变器的ESCOM并网条件，引用IEC标准（IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116）及马拉维230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数——而非中国常用的220/380 V参数；（4）公用事业规模或捐助资助项目的捐助方和贷款方采购规则（世界银行、MCC、非洲开发银行），通常要求来自ILAC认可实验室的第三方IEC型式试验证书；（5）对于离网和微电网太阳能家用系统，VeraSol / IEC TS 62257质量验证是发展融资买方日益要求的条件。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准不满足马拉维基于IEC的要求，不可在没有补充IEC测试证据的情况下替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口馬拉威時，主要實際差距包括：（1）MBS進口合格評定（PVoC式裝運前或目的地檢驗方案）——中國GB/T證書不被自動接受；（2）項目或供貨活動的MERA許可證，可能規定基於IEC的設備標準；（3）併網逆變器的ESCOM併網條件，引用IEC標準（IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116）及馬拉威230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數——而非中國常用的220/380 V參數；（4）公用事業規模或捐助資助項目的捐助方和貸款方採購規則（世界銀行、MCC、非洲開發銀行），通常要求來自ILAC認可實驗室的第三方IEC型式試驗證書；（5）對於離網和微電網太陽能家用系統，VeraSol / IEC TS 62257質量驗證是發展融資買方日益要求的條件。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準不滿足馬拉威基於IEC的要求，不可在沒有補充IEC測試證據的情況下替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
